samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable bit to control the multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable bit to control the multiplication operation.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product of the multiplication operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="N">8</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <para>Reset the internal registers and output enable signal on the active-low reset signal.</para>
        <para>On the positive edge of the clock, update the input registers with the input values.</para>
        <para>Generate the partial products based on the multiplier bits.</para>
        <para>Calculate the partial sums based on the generated partial products.</para>
        <para>Update the output register with the accumulated sum.</para>
        <para>Set the output enable signal based on the input enable signal.</para>
    </implementation>
</module>
